query:
SELECT c.externalId, c.name, s.externalId as svcId, s.planName, s.serviceType, s.locationAddress, s.provider, s.status
FROM customers c
JOIN services s ON s.customerExternalId = c.externalId
WHERE c.name LIKE '%Gorman%'
ORDER BY s.serviceType;
